decision: Accepted. F3 R7 completed a live Phase 3B.2 review lifecycle in a disposable repository: package construction, reviewer invocation, report validation, adjudication, remediation, targeted re-review validation, fresh verification, and local disposable commit.
observations: R7 used the source plugin as input only and completed inside a disposable F3 fixture repository.
The live stream contains UNIT_REVIEW and TARGETED_REREVIEW dispatches to cost-oriented-agentic-workflow:cow-reviewer with literal REVIEW_PACKAGE_PATH and REVIEW_REPORT_PATH fields.
review-report.mjs validation passed for the UNIT_REVIEW report and for the TARGETED_REREVIEW report with accepted finding id F-001.
The controller adjudicated F-001 as accepted, F-002 as rejected because it was a process-timing artifact of controller-owned final commit, and F-003 as non-blocking.
One remediation wave fixed F-001 by adding finite/range validation for the money-like percentOff input and regression coverage.
The targeted re-review approved the F-001 remediation with no introduced blocking regressions.
Fresh fixture verification passed with 11 tests and 0 failures.
The disposable fixture created local commit 3947c75; no push, tag, publish, dependency install, or source-checkout modification occurred.
The original PowerShell-captured stream is preserved as encoded provenance; the accepted analysis uses the UTF-8 normalized stream with the same stream events and no malformed JSONL lines.

priorAttempts.label: F3 R5
priorAttempts.reason: Missing literal review package/report dispatch fields and targeted re-review validation fails with accepted finding ids.

priorAttempts.label: F3 R6
priorAttempts.reason: Review package/report dispatch fields were observed and analyzer violations were zero, but the session limit stopped before targeted re-review completion.
